scripts.test:services: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.tmp/service-tests',{recursive:true,force:true})" && tsc --outDir .tmp/service-tests --rootDir . --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2022 --lib ES2022,DOM --types node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --strict tests/dotti-services.test.ts && node --test .tmp/service-tests/tests/dotti-services.test.js
